Not specified
Acrocephalus sechellensis
Acropora cervicornis
Aedes aegypti
Ailuropoda melanoleuca
Ailurus fulgens
Allenopithecus nigroviridis
Amolops chunganensis
Anas acuta
Anas platyrhynchos
Anas poecilorhyncha
Anas querquedula
Anas strepera
Anolis carolinensis
Anopheles coluzzii
Anopheles funestus
Anopheles gambiae
Anser indicus
Apis mellifera
Apodemus speciosus
Apodemus argenteus
Arabidopsis thaliana
Argyrosomus regius
Aves
Aythya ferina
Bison bison bison
Bos grunniens
Bos taurus
Branta canadensis
Buxus sempervirens
Caenorhabditis elegans
Calonectris borealis
Canis latrans
Canis lupus
Canis lupus familiaris
Capra hircus
Cebus capucinus
Cercopithecus neglectus
Cervus nippon kopschi
Chlorocebus pygerythrus
Circus aeruginosus
Colobus angolensis
Coturnix japonica
Danio rerio
Desmodus rotundus
Drosophila melanogaster
Duttaphrynus melanostictus
Elephas maximus
Eptesicus fuscus
Equus caballus
Equus hemionus hemionus
Eulemur flavifrons
Felis catus
Fukomys damarensis
Fulmarus glacialis
Gallus gallus
Gallus gallus domesticus
Glossina palpalis palpalis
Glossophaga soricina
Grus grus
Halcyon smyrnensis
Hapalemur griseus
Hirundo rustica
Hoolock tianxing
Homo sapiens
Ixodes ricinus
Lasioglossum malachurum
Lemur catta
Leptobrachella liui
Macaca assamensis
Macaca fascicularis
Macaca mulatta
Mauremys reevesii
Mesocricetus auratus
Mirza coquereli
Molossus molossus 
Monodelphis domestica
Moschus berezovskii
Motacilla citreola
Mus musculus
Myodes rufocanus
Myotis
Myotis chinensis
Myotis lucifugus
Netta rufina
Nomascus hainanus
Nomascus concolor
Ornithorhynchus anatinus
Oryctolagus cuniculus
Ovis aries
Pan troglodytes
Pelophylax nigromaculatus
Perimyotis subflavus
Phacochoerus africanus
Phascolarctos cinereus
Phoenicopterus roseus
Pipistrellus
Pipistrellus pipistrellus
Pithecia pithecia
Potamochoerus porcus
Premnas biaculeatus
Ptychadena mascareniensis
Rana pipiens
Rattus norvegicus
Rhacophorus minimus
Rhinolophus
Rhinolophus ferrumequinum
Rodentia
Salmo salar
Saxicola torquatus
Schistura fasciolata
Strongylocentrotus purpuratus
Sturnira lilium 
Sus scrofa domesticus
Symphalangus syndactylus
Theloderma rhododiscus
Theobroma cacao
Theropithecus gelada
Trachypithecus obscurus
Tringa ochropus
Tscherskia triton
Ursus arctos
Ursus maritimus
Ursus thibetanus
Vanellus malabaricus
Varecia rubra
Vulpes corsac
Vulpes vulpes
Xenopus laevis
Xenopus tropicalis
